summary: Tests cover all main requirements: classification (expired/warning/ok), both output formats, CLI integration, workflow structure, and actionlint validation. Fixtures and act harness are well-designed. However, edge case coverage is limited—missing tests for warn_days boundary conditions (=0, exactly at threshold), date boundaries (now=last_rotated, now<last_rotated), empty secrets, invalid JSON roots, policy_days≤0, and sorting of warning/ok buckets. Only 2 act test scenarios tested when task mentions 3 urgency levels suggests more comprehensive coverage needed (all-expired, all-warning). No test demonstrates the TDD process explicitly. Design is solid but could use parametrized tests to reduce duplication and make test matrix more maintainable.
